emails.subject: Southern
emails.body: For a deal with Southern they would like to amend the true up period to be 90 days. This is some language we used on an older deal under Special Provisions: For purposes of this Transaction, the phrase "within 30 calendar days" in line 5 of Section 7.3 of the Commodity Definitions shall be replaced by the phrase "within 90 calendar days." Is it O.K. to use this again. Forwarded by Jarrod Cyprow/HOU/ECT on 04/04/2000 03:07 PM Bob Crane 04/04/2000 02:08 PM

emails.subject: Southern
emails.body: For a deal with Southern they would like to amend the true up period to be 90 days. This is some language we used on an older deal under Special Provisions: For purposes of this Transaction, the phrase "within 30 calendar days" in line 5 of Section 7.3 of the Commodity Definitions shall be replaced by the phrase "within 90 calendar days." Is it O.K. to use this again. Forwarded by Jarrod Cyprow/HOU/ECT on 04/04/2000 03:07 PM Bob Crane 04/04/2000 02:08 PM

emails.subject: Re: Southern
emails.body: Re: Southern Jarrod: that language works fine. Sara Enron North America Corp. From: Jarrod Cyprow 04/04/2000 03:12 PM
